title: $SWAP_COLORS
text: $SWAP_COLORS Invert the color matrix. $SWAP_COLORS Defaults Assignment file: Any application assignment file Section: [SETTINGS] Default value: None Description In an earlier version of Uniface, on a few platforms, the color matrix was inverted. The $SWAP_COLORS setting allows applications that were developed using the inverted color matrix to function on other platforms and on later versions of Uniface, after the color matrix was brought in line with the standard matrix.
